creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for dropping this on the floor for so long. Do you still want to get this into the ports tree? Does the patch need updating, is this still the latest version?

According to https://wiki.asterisk.org/wiki/display/AST/Asterisk+GUI asterisk-gui should no longer be used.

I'M setting this to closed, but am willing to work with the submitter if this should still go in, if it's still useful.
